project_name: TLS ARENA - THE LION SQUAD eSPORTS
archetype: Hybrid of Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) and Archetype 2 (Performance Pro)

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

grid_strategy.marketing: Asymmetrical 'Bento' grid with gap-8 to gap-12. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12.
grid_strategy.dashboard: Dense 'Control Room' grid with gap-4 or gap-6. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4.

buttons.primary: bg-[#29B6E8] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#1E95C2] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(41,182,232,0.6)] transition-all rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#29B6E8] text-[#29B6E8] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[rgba(41,182,232,0.1)] transition-all rounded-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-white hover:text-[#29B6E8] hover:bg-white/5 transition-all rounded-sm

cards.default: bg-[#18181B] border border-white/10 rounded-sm hover:border-[#29B6E8]/40 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

headers.main: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

badges.live: bg-[#FF3B30]/20 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/50 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-sm animate-pulse
badges.check_in: bg-[#FFD700]/20 text-[#FFD700] border border-[#FFD700]/50 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-sm
badges.open: bg-[#00FF88]/20 text-[#00FF88] border border-[#00FF88]/50 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-sm
badges.ended: bg-white/10 text-white/70 border border-white/20 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-sm

bracket_tree.background: bg-[#0A0A0A] with faint cyan neon grid overlay or radial gradient
bracket_tree.typography: Use Outfit for team names, Rajdhani for scores. High contrast.

tv_beamer_mode.background: Pure black (#000000) for highest contrast on projectors/displays
tv_beamer_mode.typography: Rajdhani font, massive scale (e.g., text-6xl to text-9xl). All caps.
tv_beamer_mode.layout: Top 3 podium highlight (center, left, right), scrolling list for remaining ranks.
tv_beamer_mode.animations: Smooth row transitions for live updates (Framer Motion).
tv_beamer_mode.colors: Gold for 1st, Silver for 2nd, Bronze for 3rd, Cyan for active player/lap.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Use colored glows instead of drop shadows (e.g., shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(41,182,232,0.15)])
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used only for floating UI (nav, modals): bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle CRT scanline or noise texture overlay on dark backgrounds to add grit and depth.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Always explicit. Change text color and border color on hover. Increase neon glow.

libraries_and_tools.ui_components: shadcn/ui (highly customized with 0-2px border-radius and neon borders)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text and 3:1 for large text. Use pure white for primary text against #0A0A0A.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and the provided brand colors (#29B6E8, #0A0A0A). Do not use default SaaS blue or Vercel aesthetics.
For typography, use Unbounded for all major headings, Outfit for body text, and Rajdhani for scores/leaderboards/TV mode numbers.
Implement a dedicated TV/Beamer display view that utilizes extremely large typography (Rajdhani) and high contrast for F1 Fast Laps.
Use the provided official Lion Squad logos for the header, footer, and branding moments.
Avoid heavily rounded corners (rounded-xl, rounded-2xl). Keep the UI sharp and tactical (rounded-sm or rounded-none).
Implement 'Tracing Beam' or glowing border effects on primary CTA cards and the active tournament brackets.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as specified in the testing guidelines.
